items.titolo: Huawei could seize China’s AI chip crown in 2026 as Nvidia's H200 shipments stall in regulatory limbo — Beijing pushes homegrown AI hardware dominance in a market projected to hit $67 billion by 2030
items.descrizione: Huawei is reportedly on track to become China’s top AI chip supplier as Nvidia faces export restrictions and customs delays. Analysts forecast China’s domestic AI chip market could hit $67 billion by 2030.

items.titolo: Nuova Renault Espace 2026 full hybrid: da 5 a 7 posti, con un buon brio - Video

items.titolo: I used Photoshop's new AI tool to rotate objects in 3D, and it's pure magic
items.descrizione: Adobe's AI-enabled Rotate Object tool can do some really cool things, but human skill is still crucial for success.

items.titolo: I replaced my dad's aging Lenovo desktop with this Dell model - and don't regret it
items.descrizione: Dell's 24-inch AiO is a compact, easy-to-use desktop with reliable performance and great speakers, but it comes with some expected limitations.

items.descrizione: Quello dei robot tagliaerba è uno dei segmenti più vivaci dell’outdoor tech e ngli ultimi anni ha vissuto una trasformazione rapidissima: se fino a poco tempo fa il filo...

items.titolo: Wingtech posts $1.3 billion loss and faces Shanghai delisting as Nexperia audit collapses — 57% of company's assets can't be verified
items.descrizione: According to a filing to the Shanghai bourse on Wednesday, Wingtech's stock will carry a delisting risk warning starting May 6th.

items.titolo: Mark Zuckerberg says Meta is cutting 8,000 jobs to pay for AI infrastructure — insatiable compute demand means the company can't rule out further headcount reductions
items.descrizione: Meta spent $72.2 billion on capex in all of 2025. The midpoint of its new 2026 guidance would nearly double that figure in a single year.

items.titolo: Intel details 18A-P process node, touts higher performance, lower power, and better thermals — 9% more performance, thermal conductivity improved by 50%
items.descrizione: Intel details improvements of 18A-P that include higher performance, lower power, reduced variability, improved yields, and more.

items.titolo: Star Wars entra in casa: ecco il Grogu animatronico più realistico mai creato
items.descrizione: Hasbro lancia Ultimate Grogu, animatronico alto 37 cm con oltre 250 movimenti e suoni realistici.

items.descrizione: OpenAI lancia Cyber per la sicurezza informatica ma l'accesso resta riservato a pochi esperti.

items.titolo: Pentagon budget documents reveal it's pursuing containerized 300kW+ laser weapons, ambitious Joint Laser Weapon System designed to shoot down cruise missiles — system part of $17.9 billion Golden Dome missile-defense ini
items.descrizione: New Pentagon FY2027 budget documents reveal the Joint Laser Weapon System, a containerized 300kW+ laser weapon designed to intercept cruise missiles as part of the US military’s Golden Dome missile-defense initiative.

items.titolo: ADAS sempre più cari. Perché è colpa (anche) dell'AI
items.descrizione: L’aumento della domanda di chip per i data center AI sta sottraendo memoria DRAM all'automotive. BYD è il primo costruttore ad ammettere i rincari.

items.titolo: This Indigenous Language Survived Russian Occupation. Can It Survive YouTube?
items.descrizione: YouTube’s search and recommendation algorithms are driving children to Russian-language content even when they seek out videos in Kyrgyz, creating a cultural shift that concerns some parents.

items.titolo: Anthropic punta a 900 miliardi: il sorpasso su OpenAI è vicino
items.descrizione: Anthropic punta a una valutazione di 900 miliardi di dollari per superare OpenAI entro due settimane.
